review_title: Сovers all needs at the best price
author: Sergey B.
pros: I liked the most the simplicity and the simultaneous power of this product. Chaport has all features that we wanted to have in our early-stage startup, we don't want the live-chat tool to be too complex. An equally important point is the price. in comparison with competitors, it is the best price on the market
cons: There were some minor issues like rendering in a custom element, we contacted Chaports's support, and they promised to implement this in the next releases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A game changer for our business. We now offer chat services to all our customers.
author: Nick C.
pros: Ease of use. flexibility, integrates with all the major platforms!
cons: I don't think there is anything to be honest.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Mihailo D.
pros: Very usful software, the best thing about this is multilingual chat widget. Also the price is 0$. You can customize your chat and that is also intresting.
cons: Installation instructions and requirements are a little bit confusing, but you only need some extra time, and you can use a really intresting software
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: We are able to talk to customers right away, solving problems and sending leads to our team faster than if they had to find our site's contact form.
author: Alyssa B.
pros: I love that I can schedule my team's hours. I love that we can save responses and that it has brought us more leads than normal.
cons: I would like it if any data, like phone, email, name and notes were saved to the email when you email a chat transcript to yourself. Downloading a chat just gives me a text file, and it's useless.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, yet awesome software you must have on your website!
description: What can I say more than that yesterday we installed the Chaport chat on our website and this morning we got our first lead! What more would one want?
author: Igor N.
pros: The things I liked the most is the easy of use, GUI is intuitive and you don't need any training for that. Me and my colleagues use Windows and Android app and it's working flawlessly. You have the ability to customize the look of the chat, sounds, and many more. Installation into WordPress is easy with their plugin. And I must say that their customer support is more than you could wish for!
cons: None. Everything is as explained on the website.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent! I would also like to use it for our company's website soon!
author: Thea E.
pros: It's cheap and super easy to deploy. It has a free trial that gives me access to most, if not, all features. Took me less than 30 minutes to get everything setup. I also like the customer service, they helped me with the most basic questions and try to "dumb down" for me.
cons: It's not as robust as other more complex live chat support like livechat, but it meets basic needs. I would recommend this for SMBs who would like to increase page engagement and tight on a budget.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Marketing and Creative Agency for Music Loves Chaport!
description: This website's chat feature is by far the best I have come across in years.
author: Frank M.
pros: Ease of use and confidence no matter where I the requests will find me.
cons: I would like a way to appear online most of the day, I always have device with me and think I would be used more by potential clients.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: William B.
pros: Leads are everything in my business. I needed a way to get website visitors to leave there name and number so my sales staff could contact them without a bunch of "unnecessary" chats. Therefore, the ability to customize the product with very little computer skills is what I like most about Chaport software. Plus your customer service. Thank you [SENSITIVE CONTENT] for your help.
cons: I have very little experience with chatbot software, so I really don't know. Maybe some more templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fast, Clean & Easy to use Live chat service
author: Gökhan A.
pros: Easy to use, cool UI & great customer support!
cons: Chaport solves all my needs for now.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Awesome new chat platform which does its core service well
description: It has been great. With great customer support.
author: Suvran R.
pros: It simplify the chat conversation like with the unified box, chat forward and tagging. But at the same time cover the automation very well. And as we know the features in the coming month, it is worth subscribing for.
cons: Not much as it does its core work accurately.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helping us improve our customer service
description: I love the improvement we have made. The colors, the images, everything is very nice. I would clearly recommend it.
author: Lourdes T.
pros: We used to have another live chat service but we didn´t have very good results. I made some search and found that Chaport had a reasonable price and good features. It´s working wonderfully and we have many more contacts from clients. And the Customer service is very good.
cons: The only thing it´s not very good (but I have seen it´s not better in other live chats) it´s that sometimes we miss the contact of the client. It would be better a pop up or something. The sound is not very loud so we need to have more seats to make sure one of us hears it. But as I say, I haven´t found any better one.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent really happy with it. Installed on 2 of my business sites and will recommend on facebook.
author: Armstrong L.
pros: What i like most is that it doenst have too many features, and it just works as it should. Intuitive to setup, not much troubleshooting needed. No issues displaying the chat even with a heavily cached website. It doesnt slow the website down unlike tidio. Which is super important. Clean and professional design without extra elements. Good desktop and mobile app. It's done all the basics well, and thats what i need.
cons: nothing so far. No issues run into and nothing to change yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice chat if you are interested in selling online!
description: Easy to use! Nice design for the user and for the administration.
author: Carlos T.
pros: Easy to use and no clunky UI. I liked the design too, it adapts very well in our websites.
cons: There is room to improve some things, maybe the message when they change the page are looking can be a shown as a timeline instead of a message in the chat. But they are open to hear any suggestion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Does what we need it to do.
author: David R.
pros: Easy to integrate on our website, and web UI is easy to use
cons: Need real time updates push to mobile device.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We are getting instant feedback from clients and useful leads so its great for us
author: Robert M.
pros: Its easy to use and allows for instant communication with leads on our website
cons: Not very easy to navigate in the begining but once you get a hang of it its fine
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Pedro S.
pros: I liked the chatbot, it was easy to incorporate into my code and besides being free
cons: Some features are paid, which limits you to small functions!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Live Chat for My and Your business
author: Nataliya E.
pros: We had everything we needed except emojis, but developers added this feature fast enough. great customer service!

author: Frank M.
pros: It was easy to setup and integrate. The desktop app allows us to have coverage and communicate with customers easily.
cons: I'd love to have more customization options, but it is great value for the money.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Leejo J.
pros: Seamless Integration - we set it up under 5 minutes. Seamless Configuration Easy to use Pricing
cons: The App gets offline quite often automatically
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Boost of the sales, brand loyality
author: Filip S.
pros: Usability, simplicity, clarity, modern design, customer support. We like it very much because boosted our sales.
cons: Only a few design problems. I believe that somebody from their developer team will fix it very soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great product, worked seamlessly into our web-based learning tool.
author: Jessica P.
pros: We needed a product that could have a lot of user logins and flexibility, and Chaport team worked really well. And their Customer Service team is amazing. Almost instant responses and they have solved all issues I've directed their way.
cons: Haven't had any bad experiences with Chaport
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nick K.
pros: I tried a couple of Live Chat plugs for my web. But finally chose Chaport.
cons: Im very satisfied with Chaport. Installed by WordPress to my website. Download APP for ISO. It's all easy and free. Just WOW!!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Efficient, purified, easy to use and integrate
author: Harris M.
pros: Very easy to use, it does not have millions of features that you'll never need, very simple, delivers the promise that they make, and most importantly they have applications for all the platforms which makes it faster and easier for our users to use them daily and interact with clients
cons: For now, no cons, everything seems neat as explained
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My students have benefited by having access to me for real-time help, and the access is easy since it isn't device or platform specific. I have benefited by the satisfaction of helping my students, and by the fact that I can use numbers to quantify how exactly I've helped students with their learning.
author: Billy P.
pros: Students love the fact that they can get a hold of me in various ways, whether in person, by phone, email, and chat. They especially like the chat option because unlike email, it's in real time; and unlike the phone, it doesn't product anxiety. I really like Chaport because it's easy to use, both for me and for my students, and the customer support team at Chaport are, and have been, extraordinary in their kindness, patience, and going out of their way to understand and help with any questions that have come up. These days, when customer support from many other organizations has become almost non-existent, Chaport truly stands out as extraordinary.
cons: I can't think of anything that I don't like about Chaport. I suppose I could selfishly wish everything was free, but that would be a shortcoming on my part, not theirs since they too have to make a living.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Ghazwan E.
pros: in addition to all implemented good features and user-friendly interface , Chaport is providing its services world wide . no banned countries or regions !! i used another software once and i lost lots of clients . after investigation the software was not showing on their side because of USA sanctions .so clients move into another service same as my service and i lost them . when i started using Chaport . most of them come back .
cons: User friendly . no banned countries , ease of use , well managed Admin panel so u couls find who works more hours , who has bad rate or good rate ...etc
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
